app.name: Tocify
app.one_liner: Tocify is a free, online and open-source web application to add, edit, or generate Table of Contents (ToCs) / bookmarks for PDFs using AI.

screens.name: Main Editor
screens.purpose: Display PDF preview alongside editable table of contents with AI-generated structure.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Configure AI provider, API keys, font, and page label preferences.

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve all ToC entries for current document in hierarchical order.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a single ToC entry with title, page number, and nesting level.

rust_commands.name: skip_ai_match
rust_commands.purpose: Allow user to skip irrelevant or incorrect AI-suggested ToC items during generation.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic ToC editing UI
week 1: Implement PDF upload and preview
week 1: Integrate Web Worker for client-side parsing
week 1: Support one AI provider (Gemini) with BYO key
acceptance_tests: Application must handle Roman numeral front matter (e.g., 'iii') and map it correctly to physical page numbers.
Bookmarks generated from ToC must navigate correctly to intended pages without opening local directories or showing encoding artifacts.
For dual-column directory PDFs, extracted page numbers must appear in correct sequential order.
When user selects Doubao as AI provider, system must call Doubao API—not Gemini—and succeed without fetch failure.
